problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Combining Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
